cd /data/hxy/projects/RescueCredit
python - <<'PY'
import base64, datetime, os, shutil, zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('/data/hxy/projects/RescueCredit').resolve()
archive = Path('/tmp/deployable_harness_stage1_patch.zip')
archive.write_bytes(base64.b64decode(''''''))
backup = root / 'outputs' / 'code_backups' / ('deployable_harness_' + datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S'))
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive) as zf:
    for member in zf.infolist():
        target = (root / member.filename).resolve()
        if target != root and root not in target.parents:
            raise RuntimeError(f'unsafe archive member: {member.filename}')
        if target.exists() and target.is_file():
            saved = backup / member.filename
            saved.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            shutil.copy2(target, saved)
    zf.extractall(root)
print('PATCH_APPLIED', root)
print('BACKUP_DIR', backup)
PY
chmod +x scripts/cloud/run_deployable_harness_gate.sh scripts/cloud/run_deployable_harness_qwen_gate.sh
source data_disk_env.sh
source .venv/bin/activate
python -m pytest -q tests/test_deployable_harness_no_oracle.py
export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2
bash scripts/cloud/run_deployable_harness_qwen_gate.sh
